item.name: List public models or fetch a single model

query.description: Fetch a single model by ID in format 'provider/model-name'

request.description: List all available public models. Supports filtering by provider or vendor, or fetching a single model by query parameter with ?model=<provider/model-name>.

response.name: Successful Response

item.name: Fetch a single vendor by ID

variable.description: (Required) Vendor slug (e.g. `openai`, `anthropic`, `bedrock`, `azure`). Call `GET /v1/vendors` to list available slugs.

request.description: Fetch a single execution vendor by ID.
List execution vendors and the models they currently serve.
